02_sex_cell_subanalysis

Stephanie Hickey

2026-06-15

Lab: Weiming Li

Project: BCC125_sea_lamprey_scRNA

library(tidyverse)
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(scater)
library(scran)
library(patchwork)
library(pheatmap)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(readxl)
library(monocle3)
library(batchelor)
library(DT)
library(rtracklayer)
library(BiocSingular)
library(ggnewscale)
library(ggforce)
library(ggraph)
library(tidygraph)
library(scatterpie)
library(ggrepel)
source(paste0(params$project_dir, "/src/scRNA_seq_functions.R"))
results_dir = paste0(params$project_dir, "/results/20260615")
data_dir    = paste0(params$project_dir, "/data")
# gene descriptions — rebuilt from source files 
gene_description =
  read_excel(paste0(data_dir, "/41467_2024_55019_MOESM3_ESM.xlsx"), skip = 1) %>%
  dplyr::rename(WangGeneID = "CountMatrix_GeneID",
                Gene        = "NCBI_GTF_GENEID",
                description = "NCBI_GTF_ProteinInfo") %>%
  dplyr::select(Gene, WangGeneID, description) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Gene)) %>%
  filter(!WangGeneID %in% c("LOC116945425.1", "S100A1.1"))

gtf = as.data.frame(readGFF("/mnt/research/bioinformaticsCore/shared/Genomes/Petromyzon_marinus/GCF_010993605.1_kPetMar1.pri_genomic.gtf"))

gtf_filt =
  gtf %>%
  filter(gbkey %in% c("mRNA", "misc_RNA", "ncRNA", "tRNA", "rRNA")) %>%
  mutate(product = gsub(", transcript variant.*", "", product)) %>%
  dplyr::select(gene_id, product) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  dplyr::rename(Gene = "gene_id", description = "product") %>%
  mutate(WangGeneID = Gene)

notWang      = gtf_filt$Gene[!gtf_filt$Gene %in% gene_description$Gene]
gtf_add      = gtf_filt %>% filter(Gene %in% notWang)
gene_description = rbind(gene_description, gtf_add)
# known cell-type markers
markers_wide = read.csv(paste0(data_dir, "/Cell_Type_Marker_Genes_12-12-25.csv"))
markers_wide = markers_wide[, 2:ncol(markers_wide)]

markers_long <- markers_wide %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = everything(), names_to = "CellType", values_to = "Gene",
               values_drop_na = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(main_part  = str_remove(Gene, "\\s*\\(.*\\)"),
         paren_part = str_extract(Gene, "(?<=\\().*(?=\\))")) %>%
  tidyr::separate_rows(main_part, sep = "/") %>%
  mutate(main_part  = trimws(main_part),
         paren_part = trimws(paren_part)) %>%
  filter(Gene != "")

chung_davidson_markers = markers_long %>%
  dplyr::select(CellType, main_part) %>%
  dplyr::rename(WangGeneID = "main_part") %>%
  filter(!WangGeneID == "") %>%
  left_join(gene_description) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Gene))

chung_davidson_cell_type_markers = chung_davidson_markers %>%
  select(Gene, CellType)
# GO annotation
gaf = read.delim("/mnt/research/bioinformaticsCore/shared/Genomes/Petromyzon_marinus/GCF_010993605.1_kPetMar1.pri_gene_ontology.gaf",
                 header = FALSE, comment = "!")

gaf <- gaf %>%
  filter(!grepl("NOT", V4)) %>%
  dplyr::select(V3, V5) %>%
  dplyr::rename(GOID = "V5", Gene = "V3") %>%
  distinct()

keep_go = gaf %>%
  group_by(GOID) %>% tally() %>%
  filter(n > 10, n < 200) %>%
  pull(GOID)

gaf = gaf %>% filter(GOID %in% keep_go)

go_names = read.delim("/mnt/research/bioinformaticsCore/shared/Genomes/Petromyzon_marinus/GOs_names.txt",
                      header = FALSE)
colnames(go_names) = c("GOID", "GOName")
# broad annotations (15 sex cell clusters)
anno = c(
  "FGC.migrating",
  "PGC",
  "Oogonia.stem.cells",
  "Oocytes",
  "Cyst.epithelial.cells",
  "Oogonia",
  "SPC.cytokinetic",
  "MGC.SPC.group2",
  "MGC.SPC.group1",
  "MGC.SPC.group3",
  "MGC.SPC.group2",
  "MGC.SPC.group1",
  "MGC.SPC.group3",
  "MGC.SPC.group2",
  "MGC.SPC.group3"
)

colData(merged.sex.sce)$broad = anno[colData(merged.sex.sce)$label]

narrow = c(
  "Female germ cells (migrating)",
  "Primordial germ cells (migrating, differentiated, cyst)",
  "Oogonia (mitotic, cyst, stem cells)",
  "Oocytes",
  "Cyst epithelial cells",
  "Oogonia (mitotic, cyst, cell fate committed)",
  "Spermatocytes (cytokinetic)",
  "Male germ cells (migrating, cell fate committed, differentiated)",
  "Spermatocytes (meiosis arrested)",
  "Spermatocytes (migrating, S-phase, cyst connected with cell bridges, cell fate committed, GPCR-activated)",
  "Spermatocytes (apoptotic, meiosis arrested)",
  "Male germ cells (migrating, differentiated)",
  "Spermatocytes (angiogenic, cell fate committed, GPCR-activated)",
  "Spermatocytes (cell fate committed)",
  "Male germ cells (migrating, cell fate committed, differentiated, wounded)"
)

colData(merged.sex.sce)$narrow = narrow[colData(merged.sex.sce)$label]

Sex cell cluster analysis

Cells from all-cell clusters 5, 7, 16, 17, 18, 19 were re-extracted and re-clustered.

Filter and re-cluster

sample_dirs  = list.dirs(data_dir, full.names = TRUE, recursive = FALSE)
sample_names = basename(sample_dirs)

cds_list = list()
for (i in 1:length(sample_dirs)) {
  cds_list[[i]] = readRDS(paste0(sample_dirs[i], "/", sample_names[i],
                                  "_cds_mito_filter.Rds"))
}
names(cds_list) = sample_names

meta_df       = as.data.frame(colData(merged.sce))
meta_df$cells = rownames(meta_df)

all.sex.sce = list()
for (cds in names(cds_list)) {
  raw_counts = counts(cds_list[[cds]])
  all.sce    = SingleCellExperiment(list(counts = raw_counts),
                                    colData = cds_list[[cds]]@colData)
  all.sce@colData$sample = cds

  sex.cells = meta_df %>%
    filter(label %in% c(16, 17, 18, 19, 5, 7), batch == cds) %>%
    pull(cells)

  all.sex.sce[[cds]] = all.sce[, sex.cells]
}

set.seed(1)
all.sex.sce  <- lapply(all.sex.sce, logNormCounts)
all.sex.dec  <- lapply(all.sex.sce, modelGeneVar)
all.sex.hvgs <- lapply(all.sex.dec, getTopHVGs, prop = 0.1)
all.sex.sce  <- mapply(FUN = runPCA, x = all.sex.sce, subset_row = all.sex.hvgs)

saveRDS(all.sex.sce, file = paste0(results_dir, "/no.support.sex.sce.Rds"))
all.sex.dec <- lapply(all.sex.sce, modelGeneVar)

universe    <- Reduce(intersect, lapply(all.sex.sce, rownames))
all.sex.sce2 <- lapply(all.sex.sce, "[", i = universe,)
all.sex.dec2 <- lapply(all.sex.dec, "[", i = universe,)

normed.sce   <- do.call(multiBatchNorm, all.sex.sce2)
combined.dec <- do.call(combineVar, all.sex.dec2)
combined.hvg <- getTopHVGs(combined.dec, n = 5000)

set.seed(1)
merged.sex.sce <- do.call(fastMNN, c(normed.sce,
    list(subset.row = combined.hvg, BSPARAM = RandomParam())))

set.seed(1)
g <- buildSNNGraph(merged.sex.sce, use.dimred = "corrected", k = 8)
set.seed(1)
colLabels(merged.sex.sce) <- factor(igraph::cluster_louvain(g)$membership)

all.scatter.clust =
  meta_df %>%
  filter(label %in% c(16, 17, 18, 19, 5, 7)) %>%
  select(cells, label) %>%
  tibble::deframe()

all.scatter.clust              <- all.scatter.clust[colnames(merged.sex.sce)]
merged.sex.sce$all.scatter.clust = all.scatter.clust

merged.sex.sce <- runUMAP(merged.sex.sce, dimred = "corrected")
merged.sex.sce <- runTSNE(merged.sex.sce, dimred = "corrected")

saveRDS(merged.sex.sce, file = paste0(results_dir, "/no.support.merged.sex.sce.Rds"))

Plot new clusters in TSNE space

tsne_new = plotTSNE(merged.sex.sce, colour_by = "label",
                    text_by = "label", text_colour = "black", point_size = .05)
tsne_old = plotTSNE(merged.sex.sce, colour_by = "all.scatter.clust",
                    text_by = "all.scatter.clust", text_colour = "black", point_size = .05)
tsne_new + tsne_old

Original to new cluster assignment

df = as.data.frame(merged.sex.sce@colData)

df_count =
  df %>%
  select(label, all.scatter.clust) %>%
  dplyr::rename(sex.merged.clusters = "label") %>%
  dplyr::count(sex.merged.clusters, all.scatter.clust) %>%
  group_by(all.scatter.clust) %>%
  mutate(total_m1 = sum(n)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(sex.merged.clusters) %>%
  mutate(total_m2 = sum(n)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    pct_of_all.clusters = round((n / total_m1) * 100, 2),
    pct_of_sex.clusters = round((n / total_m2) * 100, 2)) %>%
  select(-total_m1, -total_m2)

datatable(df_count, filter = "top", rownames = FALSE)
write.csv(df_count, paste0(results_dir, "/cluster_to_subcluster_map.csv"))

Cluster distance heatmap (batch corrected space)

embeddings <- reducedDim(merged.sex.sce, "corrected")[, 1:30]
clusters   <- colData(merged.sex.sce)$label

centroids  <- aggregate(embeddings, by = list(cluster = clusters), FUN = mean)
rownames(centroids) <- centroids$cluster
centroids  <- centroids[, -1]

dist_matrix <- as.matrix(dist(centroids, method = "euclidean"))

pheatmap(dist_matrix,
         color          = colorRampPalette(c("lightyellow", "orange", "darkred"))(100),
         main           = "Pairwise distances between cluster centroids (batch corrected space)",
         display_numbers = TRUE,
         number_format  = "%.1f")

Sex subcluster to all-cell cluster mapping

sex subclusters all cell clusters Broad Annotation
1 Oogonia/Oocytes FGC (migrating)
2 Migrating PGCs PGC
3 Migrating PGCs Oogonia (stem cells)
4 Oogonia/Oocytes Oocytes
5 Migrating PGCs Cyst epithelial cell
6 Oogonia/Oocytes Oogonia
7 Spermatocytes (cytokinetic) SPC (cytokinetic)
8 Male germ cells (migrating) MGC/SPC group2
9 Spermatocytes (apoptotic) MGC/SPC group1
10 Male germ cells (migrating) / Spermatocytes (GPCR-activated) MGC/SPC group3
11 Male germ cells (migrating) / Spermatocytes (apoptotic) MGC/SPC group2
12 Male germ cells (migrating) / Spermatocytes (apoptotic) MGC/SPC group1
13 Spermatocytes (GPCR-activated) MGC/SPC group3
14 Spermatocytes (cytokinetic) / Male germ cells (migrating) / Spermatocytes (apoptotic) MGC/SPC group2
15 Male germ cells (migrating) / Spermatocytes (apoptotic) / Spermatocytes (GPCR-activated) MGC/SPC group3

Cells per broad annotation by sample

p <- lapply(unique(merged.sex.sce$batch), function(f) {
  sce.f = merged.sex.sce[, which(merged.sex.sce$batch == f)]
  plotTSNE(sce.f, colour_by = "broad", text_colour = "black", point_size = .05) +
    ggtitle(f)
})
wrap_plots(p, ncol = 2)

meta_df = as.data.frame(colData(merged.sex.sce))

sample_tally =
  meta_df %>%
  mutate(broad = as.factor(broad), batch = as.factor(batch)) %>%
  group_by(broad, batch, .drop = FALSE) %>%
  tally()

ggplot(sample_tally, aes(fill = batch, y = broad, x = n)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill", stat = "identity") +
  xlab("Proportion of cells")

Build combined (uncorrected) sex cell SCE

all.sex.dec  <- lapply(all.sex.sce, modelGeneVar)

universe     <- Reduce(intersect, lapply(all.sex.sce, rownames))
all.sex.sce2 <- lapply(all.sex.sce, "[", i = universe,)
all.sex.dec2 <- lapply(all.sex.dec, "[", i = universe,)

all.sex.sce2[["TM_C00004374"]]@colData$cluster = "noclust"

combined.sex.sce <- do.call(cbind, all.sex.sce2)

Cluster enriched genes

Top ~100 cluster enriched genes per broad annotation (all in no.support_sex_scatter_cluster_marker_genes.csv).

Columns: cluster, Gene, p.value, FDR, summary.logFC, WangGeneID, description

scatter_markers = findMarkers(combined.sex.sce,
                               merged.sex.sce$broad,
                               test.type = "t",
                               block     = combined.sex.sce$sample,
                               direction = "up",
                               pval.type = "some")

saveRDS(scatter_markers,
        file = paste0(results_dir, "/no.support_sex_scatter_markers.Rds"))
scatter_summary = list()
for (i in 1:length(scatter_markers)) {
  scatter_markers[[i]]$cluster = names(scatter_markers)[i]
  scatter_markers[[i]]$Gene    = rownames(scatter_markers[[i]])
  scatter_summary[[i]] = as.data.frame(scatter_markers[[i]]) %>%
    select(cluster, Gene, p.value, FDR, summary.logFC)
}

scatter_markers_df =
  do.call(rbind, scatter_summary) %>%
  left_join(gene_description, by = "Gene") %>%
  filter(FDR < .01)

write.csv(scatter_markers_df,
          file = paste0(results_dir, "/no.support_sex_scatter_cluster_marker_genes.csv"))

scatter_markers_top100 = scatter_markers_df %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  slice_min(FDR, n = 100, with_ties = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(p.value       = formatC(signif(p.value, digits = 3)),
         FDR           = formatC(signif(FDR, digits = 3)),
         summary.logFC = round(summary.logFC, digits = 3))

datatable(scatter_markers_top100, filter = "top", rownames = FALSE)

Comparison with known markers

marker_test_genes =
  scatter_markers_top100 %>%
  select(Gene, cluster)

plot_marker_overlap_heatmap(
  known_markers    = chung_davidson_cell_type_markers,
  test_genes       = marker_test_genes,
  background_n     = length(merged.sex.sce),
  gene_description = gene_description,
  overlaps_file    = paste0(results_dir, "/no.support_sex_scatter_cluster_marker_gene_overlaps.csv"),
  pvals_file       = paste0(results_dir, "/no.support_sex_scatter_cluster_marker_overlap_pvalues.csv"),
  plot_file        = paste0(results_dir, "/no.support_sex_scatter_cluster_overlap_heatmap.png")
)

Gene ontology of top 100 cluster enriched genes

Columns: GOID, GOName, nGOTermGenes, Clusters, nClusterEnrichedGenes, nSharedGenes, Pval, FDR

scores = run_go_enrichment(
  gaf             = gaf,
  gene_description = gene_description,
  go_names        = go_names,
  test_genes      = marker_test_genes,
  background_n    = length(merged.sex.sce),
  overlaps_file   = paste0(results_dir, "/no.support_sex_scatter_cluster_top_100_marker_gene_GO_overlaps.csv"),
  pvals_file      = paste0(results_dir, "/no.support_sex_scatter_cluster_top_100_marker_gene_GO_pvals.csv"),
  require_shared  = TRUE
)

datatable(scores, filter = "top", rownames = FALSE)

Gene ontology of all significant cluster enriched genes (FDR < 0.01)

marker_test_genes_all =
  scatter_markers_df %>%
  select(Gene, cluster)

scores = run_go_enrichment(
  gaf             = gaf,
  gene_description = gene_description,
  go_names        = go_names,
  test_genes      = marker_test_genes_all,
  background_n    = length(merged.sex.sce),
  overlaps_file   = paste0(results_dir, "/no.support_sex_scatter_cluster_all_sig_marker_gene_GO_overlaps_all.csv"),
  pvals_file      = paste0(results_dir, "/no.support_sex_scatter_all_sig_cluster_marker_gene_GO_pvals.csv"),
  require_shared  = TRUE
)

datatable(scores, filter = "top", rownames = FALSE)

Known marker bubble plots

nested_df   <- chung_davidson_markers %>% group_by(CellType) %>% tidyr::nest()
list_of_dfs <- nested_df$data
names(list_of_dfs) <- nested_df$CellType
names(list_of_dfs)  = gsub("\\(", "", names(list_of_dfs))

file_names = gsub(" ", "_", names(list_of_dfs))
file_names = paste0(file_names, "_germ_cell_clusters")

ct = colData(merged.sex.sce)$broad
combined.sex.sce$CellType = ct
combined.sex.sce$CellType = factor(combined.sex.sce$CellType, levels = unique(ct))
combined.sex.sce$cluster  = ct

plot_dir = paste0(results_dir, "/germ_cell_bubble")
if (!dir.exists(plot_dir)) dir.create(plot_dir)

scatter_markers_df_read = read.csv(
  file    = paste0(results_dir, "/no.support_sex_scatter_cluster_marker_genes.csv"),
  row.names = 1)

markers = scatter_markers_df_read %>%
  dplyr::rename(CellType = "cluster") %>%
  select(WangGeneID, CellType, FDR, summary.logFC) %>%
  dplyr::rename(Gene = "WangGeneID")

for (i in 1:length(list_of_dfs)) {
  plot_marker_bubbles(
    sce              = combined.sex.sce,
    markers          = markers,
    gene_description = gene_description,
    cell_type_name   = names(list_of_dfs)[i],
    cell_type_genes  = list_of_dfs[[i]],
    anno             = unique(ct),
    results_dir      = plot_dir,
    file_name        = file_names[i]
  )
}

Sex cluster annotations

sex subcluster Narrow annotation
1 Female germ cells (migrating)
2 Primordial germ cells (migrating, differentiated, cyst)
3 Oogonia (mitotic, cyst, stem cells)
4 Oocytes
5 Cyst epithelial cells
6 Oogonia (mitotic, cyst, cell fate committed)
7 Spermatocytes (cytokinetic)
8 Male germ cells (migrating, cell fate committed, differentiated)
9 Spermatocytes (meiosis arrested)
10 Spermatocytes (migrating, S-phase, cyst connected with cell bridges, cell fate committed, GPCR-activated)
11 Spermatocytes (apoptotic, meiosis arrested)
12 Male germ cells (migrating, differentiated)
13 Spermatocytes (angiogenic, cell fate committed, GPCR-activated)
14 Spermatocytes (cell fate committed)
15 Male germ cells (migrating, cell fate committed, differentiated, wounded)

Pairwise differential expression

Each section subsets two cell types, runs findMarkers, and reports GO enrichment of the top 100 and all significant (FDR < 0.01) DE genes.

PGC vs Oogonia stem cells (clusters 2 vs 3)

de_23 = run_pairwise_de(
  combined_sce   = combined.sex.sce,
  merged_sce     = merged.sex.sce,
  cluster_labels = c(2, 3),
  gene_description = gene_description,
  results_dir    = results_dir,
  file_prefix    = "no.support_sex_scatter_PCGvsOSC"
)

datatable(de_23$top100, filter = "top", rownames = FALSE)

GO enrichment — top 100 DE genes

scores = run_go_enrichment(
  gaf             = gaf,
  gene_description = gene_description,
  go_names        = go_names,
  test_genes      = de_23$top100 %>% select(Gene, cluster),
  background_n    = length(merged.sex.sce),
  overlaps_file   = paste0(results_dir, "/no.support_sex_scatter_cluster_2vs3_top_100_DE_gene_GO_overlaps.csv"),
  pvals_file      = paste0(results_dir, "/no.support_sex_scatter_cluster_2vs3_top_100_DE_gene_GO_pvals.csv"),
  require_shared  = TRUE
)

datatable(scores, filter = "top", rownames = FALSE)

GO enrichment — all significant DE genes (FDR < 0.01)

scores = run_go_enrichment(
  gaf             = gaf,
  gene_description = gene_description,
  go_names        = go_names,
  test_genes      = de_23$all %>% select(Gene, cluster),
  background_n    = length(merged.sex.sce),
  overlaps_file   = paste0(results_dir, "/no.support_sex_scatter_cluster_2vs3_sig_DE_gene_GO_overlaps.csv"),
  pvals_file      = paste0(results_dir, "/no.support_sex_scatter_cluster_2vs3_sig_DE_gene_GO_pvals.csv"),
  require_shared  = TRUE
)

datatable(scores, filter = "top", rownames = FALSE)

PGC vs Female germ cells (clusters 2 vs 1)

de_21 = run_pairwise_de(
  combined_sce   = combined.sex.sce,
  merged_sce     = merged.sex.sce,
  cluster_labels = c(2, 1),
  gene_description = gene_description,
  results_dir    = results_dir,
  file_prefix    = "no.support_sex_scatter_PCGvsFGC"
)

datatable(de_21$top100, filter = "top", rownames = FALSE)

GO enrichment — top 100 DE genes

scores = run_go_enrichment(
  gaf             = gaf,
  gene_description = gene_description,
  go_names        = go_names,
  test_genes      = de_21$top100 %>% select(Gene, cluster),
  background_n    = length(merged.sex.sce),
  overlaps_file   = paste0(results_dir, "/no.support_sex_scatter_cluster_2v1_top_100_DE_gene_GO_overlaps.csv"),
  pvals_file      = paste0(results_dir, "/no.support_sex_scatter_cluster_2vs1_top_100_DE_gene_GO_pvals.csv"),
  require_shared  = TRUE
)

datatable(scores, filter = "top", rownames = FALSE)

GO enrichment — all significant DE genes (FDR < 0.01)

scores = run_go_enrichment(
  gaf             = gaf,
  gene_description = gene_description,
  go_names        = go_names,
  test_genes      = de_21$all %>% select(Gene, cluster),
  background_n    = length(merged.sex.sce),
  overlaps_file   = paste0(results_dir, "/no.support_sex_scatter_cluster_2vs1_sig_DE_gene_GO_overlaps.csv"),
  pvals_file      = paste0(results_dir, "/no.support_sex_scatter_cluster_2vs1_sig_DE_gene_GO_pvals.csv"),
  require_shared  = TRUE
)

datatable(scores, filter = "top", rownames = FALSE)

PGC vs Male germ cells (clusters 2 vs 12)

de_212 = run_pairwise_de(
  combined_sce   = combined.sex.sce,
  merged_sce     = merged.sex.sce,
  cluster_labels = c(2, 12),
  gene_description = gene_description,
  results_dir    = results_dir,
  file_prefix    = "no.support_sex_scatter_PCGvsMGC"
)

datatable(de_212$top100, filter = "top", rownames = FALSE)

GO enrichment — top 100 DE genes

scores = run_go_enrichment(
  gaf             = gaf,
  gene_description = gene_description,
  go_names        = go_names,
  test_genes      = de_212$top100 %>% select(Gene, cluster),
  background_n    = length(merged.sex.sce),
  overlaps_file   = paste0(results_dir, "/no.support_sex_scatter_cluster_2v12_top_100_DE_gene_GO_overlaps.csv"),
  pvals_file      = paste0(results_dir, "/no.support_sex_scatter_cluster_2vs12_top_100_DE_gene_GO_pvals.csv"),
  require_shared  = TRUE
)

datatable(scores, filter = "top", rownames = FALSE)

GO enrichment — all significant DE genes (FDR < 0.01)

scores = run_go_enrichment(
  gaf             = gaf,
  gene_description = gene_description,
  go_names        = go_names,
  test_genes      = de_212$all %>% select(Gene, cluster),
  background_n    = length(merged.sex.sce),
  overlaps_file   = paste0(results_dir, "/no.support_sex_scatter_cluster_2vs12_sig_DE_gene_GO_overlaps.csv"),
  pvals_file      = paste0(results_dir, "/no.support_sex_scatter_cluster_2vs12_sig_DE_gene_GO_pvals.csv"),
  require_shared  = TRUE
)

datatable(scores, filter = "top", rownames = FALSE)

Session info

sessionInfo()
## R version 4.4.1 (2024-06-14)
## Platform: x86_64-pc-linux-gnu
## Running under: Ubuntu 22.04.5 LTS
## 
## Matrix products: default
